details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, retrieved the actual page content via browser automation, and reported the correct total of 824 open issues along with the 5 most recent issue titles with real issue numbers and authors. The titles are specific and match what was actually on the page (not hallucinated). The 'Bug:' titles for issues #36207, #36206, and #36205 are legitimately short titles as submitted by users, which the agent correctly noted.
